purpose: Preserve task intent, evidence, authority, and decision state when work crosses Agent or Skill boundaries.

identity.context_id: Stable across related work in one user intent chain.
identity.task_id: Stable only until a terminal task state; refinements create a new task id under the same context id.
identity.context_version: Monotonically increases when the envelope meaningfully changes.

transfer_modes.inline: Small authoritative facts and decisions are carried in the envelope.
transfer_modes.reference: Large evidence and outputs are stored once and transferred as immutable retrievable references.
transfer_modes.hybrid: Default mode: compact task state inline, evidence and generated artifacts by reference.

rules: Do not forward the entire chat history by default.
Do not recursively summarize an earlier summary when the original source remains retrievable.
Separate verified facts, assumptions, uncertainty, and conflicts.
Every fact and decision must retain basis references when evidence exists.
Declare omitted material and how the recipient can retrieve it.
Large artifacts travel by reference with authority, version or hash, and retrievability metadata.
Private chain-of-thought, hidden reasoning traces, credentials, and unrelated tenant data are forbidden.
The recipient verifies the envelope hash and explicitly accepts, requests context, or rejects the handoff.
A sender cannot treat pending_acceptance as completed delivery.
A terminal task is immutable; later refinement creates a new task id linked by context id.
